hero.title: Lake. Forest. Your night near Oulu.
hero.sub: A quiet lakeside campsite for motorhomes, tents and cabin stays — 15 minutes from Oulu, at the gates of Rokua Geopark.
hero.imgAlt: Aerial view of Järvenranta campsite in morning mist over a lake and coniferous forest
quick.title: Check availability
quick.note: Pay on arrival — no prepayment required.
usp.1.title: Direct lake view
usp.1.body: Every shoreline pitch faces the water. Private jetty, swimming beach and rowing boats for guests.
usp.2.title: Sauna and service building
usp.2.body: Wood-heated lakeside sauna nightly. New service building: showers, kitchen, laundry.
usp.3.title: 15 minutes from Oulu
usp.3.body: On the E75 route to Lapland. Easy stop for one night or a full holiday.
pitch.title: Three ways to spend the night
pitch.tent.title: Tent pitch
pitch.tent.body: On soft moss under a pine canopy. 40 pitches.
pitch.tent.imgAlt: Orange tent in a birch forest in morning light
pitch.caravan.title: Motorhome pitch
pitch.caravan.body: With (16 A) or without electricity. Grill shelters and recycling nearby. 24 pitches.
pitch.caravan.imgAlt: White motorhome parked at an electric hookup post by the lake
pitch.cabin.title: Cabins
pitch.cabin.body: Traditional red cabins for 2–4 guests. Linens and breakfast optional. 6 cabins.
pitch.cabin.imgAlt: A red wooden cabin among pines by the lake at evening light
area.title: What to do around Järvenranta
area.1.title: Rokua Geopark
area.1.body: UNESCO geopark, 20 min drive. Marked hiking trails, dune lakes and untouched esker landscape.
area.2.title: Paddling the Oulu river
area.2.body: Rent a canoe or kayak from our jetty. Calm waters, beginner-friendly.
area.3.title: Fishing
area.3.body: Perch, pike and whitefish. Regional lure permit sold at reception.
area.4.title: Berries and mushrooms
area.4.body: Blueberries late July, lingonberries in August, ceps in September. Foraging maps on loan.
reviews.title: What recent guests wrote
reviews.1.text: The quietest campsite we've ever stopped at. The sauna after the drive was perfect.
reviews.1.name: Anna & Petri, Tampere
reviews.2.text: Ideal stop between Helsinki and Lapland. Very clean facilities and lovely lake view.
reviews.2.name: Familie Klein, München
reviews.3.text: The kids spent the whole day on the beach and the rowing boats. We'll be back next summer.
reviews.3.name: Halonen family, Kuopio
